subject: A female figure in a light-colored outfit with a dark clover-pattern motif, depicted in a serious or conflicted expression — the 'Switching Sides' subtitle signals a narrative pivot moment from antagonist to ally

description: A mid-shot portrait of a dark-haired figure in a pale uniform or robe with a visible four-leaf clover or cross pattern repeated on the garment — possibly associated with the Holy Knights faction insignia in the Seven Deadly Sins anime. The art is anime-style with clean linework. No weapons are visibly in hand at this resolution — hands appear to be in a composed position. The clover motif is legible as a repeated badge element though fine details of trim are below resolution threshold.
